items.title: Immersion Cooling Fluids Market Set For 8.2% Growth, Reaching $2.15 Billion by 2032 Globally
items.author: Imir Market Research Pvt Ltd.
items.description: The global immersion cooling fluids market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 8.2% from 2023 to 2032, driven by increasing demand from data centers, EV batteries, and solar photovoltaic cells. The market is segmented by type, technology, and end-use, with North America and Asia-Pacific being the key regional markets.

items.title: Space Sensors and Actuators Market to surpass USD 10.9 billion by 2034, Says Global Market Insights inc.
items.author: Global Market Insights Inc.
items.description: The space sensors and actuators market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 14.2% between 2025 and 2034, driven by technological advancements in sensor and actuator design. The market is witnessing increased investments from government and private enterprises for space exploration missions, driving continuous innovation in the sector.
